ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier assigned to the subject */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the subject was enrolled in the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the subject (e.g., Active, Withdrawn) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any relevant medical history of the subject */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies of the subject */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the subject */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the subject (e.g., phone, address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier assigned to the treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, IV) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Any known side effects of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier assigned to the group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Inclusion criteria for the group */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Exclusion criteria for the group */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_number" INTEGER /* Number of the period in the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the period (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment group */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "auc_last" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) last */,
  "cmax" REAL /* Maximum Concentration (Cmax) */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Time to Maximum Concentration (Tmax) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data entry */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab or testing facility */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab or testing facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
